1st.notes: Display follows the chart. Active constraints are reduced for the monolithic generic solve.

2nd.notes: Chart-preserving display_elements with reduced active_constraints for the generic solve.

3rd.notes: Direct drive through the Simpson core with overdrive set locked in direct by E.

4th.notes: Overdrive set active through F brake; Simpson core in direct.

Rev.notes: Reverse state preserving the chart display while using reduced active constraints.

notes: Shift schedule for the ZF 4HP22/24 candidate universal-core model. display_elements preserve the ATSG chart names including sprags; active_constraints are the kinematically effective subset used by the generic solver.
